0.text: Increased density and minimal structural distortion in the posterior part of the upper lobe apical segment of the right lung

1.text: Suggestive of scarring in the posterior part of the upper lobe apical segment of the right lung

2.text: Minimal pleuroparenchymal scarring in the left lung apex

4.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

5.text: Bilateral minimal pleural effusion, more prominent on the right

6.text: Atelectasis in the basal segments of the lower lobe of the lung adjacent to the pleural effusion
